Management Module · CentralHub

Assessments

Plan, coordinate, and analyse network-wide assessments — from scheduling and delivery to results tracking and cross-school benchmarking.

Back to Dashboard

Live Features

EASE System

Manage the EASE handbook, exam cycle, responsibilities, policies, and reporting notes in Firestore.

Manage

Module in Development � The Assessments module is currently being built. Features listed below are planned for the upcoming release.

Planned Features

Assessment Calendar

Plan and publish a network-wide assessment schedule, giving all schools visibility of upcoming exam periods and key dates.

Planned

Assessment Templates

Create and distribute standardised assessment templates across schools to ensure consistency in format and evaluation criteria.

Planned

Results Analysis

Aggregate and analyse assessment results at class, year group, school, and network level with visual charts and insights.

Planned

Cross-School Benchmarking

Compare assessment performance between schools and against network benchmarks to identify trends and areas for improvement.

Planned

Progress Tracking

Track individual and cohort progress across assessment cycles to identify patterns and support data-driven interventions.

Planned

Report Export

Export assessment reports in multiple formats for sharing with school leaders, parents, and accreditation bodies.

Planned

Development Roadmap

  • 1

    Assessment Data Model

    Define Firestore collections for assessment events, templates, results, and benchmark data structures.

  • 2

    Calendar & Scheduling Interface

    Build the assessment planning calendar with publishing tools and school-level visibility controls.

  • 3

    Results Entry & Aggregation

    Develop interfaces for submitting, reviewing, and aggregating assessment results across schools.

  • 4

    Analytics Dashboard & Export

    Network-wide benchmarking dashboards with drill-down views and exportable reports for leadership.
